# Task Template

```md
- `ENG-XXX` Short task title
  - Status: Backlog | Ready | In Progress | Blocked | Done | Dropped
  - Owner: team or engineer name
  - Summary: one or two sentences describing the problem or intended outcome
  - Scope:
    - main files, modules, or workflows affected
  - Verification:
    - tests run, manual checks, or operational validation
  - Follow-ups:
    - separate tasks or decisions created from this work
```
